title: Ubiquiti UFiber Instant GPON ONU optical module
description: UF-Instant is a GPON SFP module with one SC connector and is designed for Ubiquiti Network EdgeSwitch, EdgeRouter, UniFi Switch and USG series or with UF-AE and F-POE-G2 products. The module will work up to distance 20km and is able to communicate with the OLT unit at asymmetric speed 2.4Gbps download and 1.2Gbps upload
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 2.488 / 1.244 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1310 / 1490 Distance [km] 20 Transfer type GPON Polishing type APC Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (1) SC
